accessNotes.en: I Kato Mersini anaferetai os simeio kolymvisis/stasi skafon stin Polyaigo. I prosvasi paramenei me idiotiko i ekdromiko skafos kai choris organomenes paroches.

sourceNotes: Popular-beach confidence pass 2026-06-02: Go Sailing lists Kato Mersini as a Polyaigos swim stop, Aegean Islands lists Pano/Kato Mersini among Polyaigos anchorages, Kimolos official context supports Polyaigos as an uninhabited rough-terrain island visited by private craft, and Debater describes Kato Mersini as a large sandy stop reached by boat. Promoted to high while preserving boat-only access and no-services status; no wind/calm/safety claim was imported.

sourceNotes: Popular-beach confidence pass 2026-06-02: Go Sailing lists Pano Mersini as a Polyaigos swim stop, Aegean Islands lists Pano/Kato Mersini among Polyaigos anchorages, Kimolos official context supports uninhabited rough-terrain/private-craft context, and Sail la Vie states Pano Mersini is on Polyegos and reached by boat with wild rocks and golden sand. Promoted to high while preserving boat-only access and no-services status; no wind/calm/safety claim was imported.

sourceNotes: Popular-beach confidence pass 2026-06-02: Go Sailing lists Panagias Avlaki as a Polyaigos swim stop, Koini Gnomi describes boat disembarkation at the sandy Panagias Avlaki beach, AllOverGreece identifies Panagias t Avlaki as the northwest port/deep bay of Polyaigos, and Debater supports sand and boat tie-up context. Promoted to high while preserving boat-only access and no-services status; no wind/calm/safety claim was imported.
